s: In 2012, Pedro Figueroa suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.320, WHIP 1.430, SO 14, WAR -0.100.
In 2013, Pedro Figueroa suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 12.000, WHIP 3.000, SO 3, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> TEX).
In 2014, Pedro Figueroa suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.000, WHIP 1.440, SO 3, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined TEX.
